summary: Enasidenib is an FDA-approved targeted therapy for adults with acute myeloid leukemia who have IDH2 gene mutations; it works by inhibiting mutated IDH2 proteins to reduce levels of the oncogenic metabolite 2-hydroxyglutarate. Its efficacy and safety are well-established within this genetically-defined patient population.
